Knowledge gap — Excalibur's historical and mythological context. Could be researched and added to knowledge base.From my knowledge base: The name of King Arthur's sword is Excalibur. According to legend, Arthur pulled Excalibur from a stone, which proved his right to be king. The sword was said to be made by the smiths of the Isle of Avallon and was a symbol of his kingship and divine right to rule.
